overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The camera follows pedestrians along wet sidewalks and across streets with futuristic vehicles, holographic advertisements, and towering glass buildings illuminated by yellow and blue neon lights.

events.description: approaching street intersection with illuminated crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wet sidewalk beside reflective glass building, approaching intersection

notable_agents.action: character in cyan jacket walking ahead on sidewalk

bright yellow neon light strip running vertically along building facade
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
sleek black vehicle parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked sidewalk in a futuristic city, following a character in a cyan jacket. To the right, a massive glass office tower reflects the neon lights, while a bright yellow vertical neon beam illuminates the left side of the street. The camera moves forward toward an intersection, with wet pavement creating reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked intersection with holographic crosswalk markings

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk to cross multi-lane street
black futuristic muscle car drives past the crosswalk from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at crosswalk, navigating between passing vehicles while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: sleek black car with glowing accents driving through intersection
character in red crop top and patterned shorts crossing street ahead

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with glowing holographic elements
large vertical billboard displaying primate advertisement with red background
wide open intersection with multiple lanes and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wide crosswalk with glowing holographic stripes, crossing the rain-slicked street. A large digital billboard displaying a gorilla advertisement dominates the right side, while futuristic cars pass by. The open intersection reveals more of the towering cityscape ahead as the camera follows the character in red across the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along Marquess Eden Plaza with palm tree planters

events.description: reaching opposite sidewalk and continuing along building frontage
passing under palm trees in planters along the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk past the illuminated Marquess building, following the character in red through palm tree planters

notable_agents.action: woman in red top and white shorts walking steadily ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated golden sign reading MARQUESS EDEN PLAZA on building facade
palm tree in rectangular planter on sidewalk edge
white billboard with COLA text and palm tree graphic

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera follows the character along a sidewalk lined with palm trees in planters. The prominent golden Marquess Eden Plaza sign illuminates the left side of the frame, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the neon city lights. The scene maintains a steady forward progression along the building frontage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass with traffic passing below

events.description: entering covered area beneath large concrete overpass structure
multiple futuristic vehicles passing under the overpass on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass alongside another pedestrian, with traffic passing on the left side

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket walking alongside on the right
stream of futuristic cars driving under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge structure overhead with yellow and black hazard stripes
row of overhead fluorescent lights illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, providing shelter from the rain. The lighting shifts to artificial overhead fluorescents. A character in a yellow jacket walks alongside, while traffic passes on the left. The Delamain building sign becomes visible in the distance as the camera moves through the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with holographic pavement advertisements and corporate buildings

events.description: exiting overpass into open street with holographic road surface ads
holographic advertisements projected onto the wet street surface become prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk past glowing holographic street advertisements, approaching the Delamain building

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated corporate sign for DELAMAIN on dark building facade
glowing blue holographic advertisements projected onto the wet street surface
building facade with geometric yellow illuminated window patterns

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens to reveal the Delamain building with its prominent illuminated signage. Holographic advertisements glow blue on the wet street surface, reflecting the neon lights. The camera continues forward along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians as the rain continues to fall on the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from a narrow neon-lit sidewalk to a wide urban intersection and finally along a palm-lined plaza. It begins by following a character in a cyan jacket past a massive glass office tower and a bright yellow neon beam, with the wet pavement creating deep reflections. As the character reaches the intersection, the camera glides across a crosswalk with glowing holographic stripes, passing futuristic cars and a dominant digital billboard of a gorilla. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite side of the street, moving forward along a sidewalk lined with potted palm trees. Finally, the progression continues past the glowing golden Marquess Eden Plaza sign, maintaining a steady flow through the illuminated cityscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered gloom of a concrete underpass into the vibrant, rain-slicked openness of a neon-lit city square. It begins beneath a massive overpass where artificial fluorescent lights illuminate a character in a yellow jacket walking beside the camera as traffic flows nearby. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space gradually opens up, revealing the glowing Delamain building sign in the distance. The scene then shifts from the gray concrete shelter back into the falling rain, where blue holographic advertisements reflect off the wet street surface. Finally, the camera continues along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians amidst the towering, illuminated architecture of the futuristic cityscape.
